title: The next era of AI coding
summary: Michael Truell argues that software engineering is shifting from manual coding to managing autonomous AI agents. He cites data showing agent requests exploding in 2025, 30% of Cursor's PRs being fully agent-generated, and enterprise AI-generated code rising from 15% to 75% in one year, with engineers transitioning to agent managers.
